resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def detectCapitalUse(self, word: str) -> bool:
        return word.isupper() or word.islower() or (word[0].isupper() and word[1:].islower())
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses Python's built-in string methods isupper() and islower() to check if the entire word or its first letter is uppercase, and then checks if the rest of the word is lowercase. This approach is efficient because it uses built-in functions and does not require any complex logic or data structures.
